message:
chore: add tmp_re_test/ to .gitignore

Ignore the tmp_re_test/ scratch directory that agents create during
regex testing experiments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -159,6 +159,9 @@ tests/e2e/artifacts/
 # UBS (Ultimate Bug Scanner) reports
 ubs*.txt
 
+# Ephemeral regex/test scratch directories (agent experiments)
+tmp_re_test/
+
 # Agent tool MCP config backups (timestamped .bak files)
 .claude/*.bak
 .cline.mcp.json.*
